top_signals.title: VPN service favored by ransomware groups is sanctioned by US
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Treasury Department announced sanctions against First VPN Service (1VPNS) and its Ukrainian administrator for aiding ransomware groups. Separately, a Belarusian man was sanctioned for malware "cryptors."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Vedanta Oil to Invest $5 Billion to Boost Output Fivefold
top_signals.summary: Vedanta Oil and Gas Ltd. will invest $5 billion to expand production by more than five times, underscoring India’s push to curb reliance on energy imports.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Genesis boss says Vault merger is the perfect pairing
top_signals.summary: Genesis and Vault sealed a merger that will create Australia's third-largest gold producer with an almost $9 billion in market capitalization.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Brussels to propose easing banks’ capital requirements
top_signals.summary: Proposal follows similar moves by US and UK as lenders push for loosening of regulation

top_signals.title: Activities of U.S. Affiliates of Foreign Multinational Enterprises, 2024
top_signals.summary: Majority-owned U.S. affiliates of foreign multinational enterprises employed 8.57 million workers in the United States in 2024, a 0.2 percent increase from 8.56 million workers in 2023, according to statistics on U.S. affiliate operations and finances released today by the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. Full Text
